case_title: CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE INC VS. LORNA LEVEXIER et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAL COAST CREDIT SERVICE INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LEVEXIER, LORNA LEVEXIER, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-02-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-16-2003
